name: pyArchInit US Table (v2 — CIDOC-ready draft)
description: DRAFT v2 mapping for pyArchInit us_table. Differences vs v1: (1) site-prefixed composite EMID; (2) settore/area/saggio/ambient become first-class LocationNodeGroup nodes (CIDOC E53 Place) linked via is_in_location, NOT flat string properties; (3) dimensional & material columns are TYPED qualia whose property_name matches em_qualia_types.json so the RDF exporter resolves them to E54 Dimension / E55 Type / E57 Material. Structural axes still TODO (epoch, geoposition, document, author, activity) — see _todo_structural_axes. REQUIRES the _process_location_memberships() engine patch to emit the LocationNodeGroup nodes.

table_settings._comment_template: Site-level verbatim EMID. Empty components collapse (A..101 -> A.101). Add {sito} so EMIDs are unique across the single multi-site us_table.

unita_tipo._comment: Drives the StratigraphicNode subclass (US/USM/USV...) via get_stratigraphic_node_class, and is a name component.

_comment_relations: is_in_location edges are emitted by the _process_location_memberships() patch (one shared node per sector, deduped by kind+value). has_property edges are emitted automatically by _process_pyarchinit_properties() for every column carrying a property_name.

_todo_structural_axes._comment: Same node-not-qualia treatment. Each needs its own engine handler, mirroring _process_location_memberships:
_todo_structural_axes.periodo_iniziale / fase_iniziale / perio: EpochNode (E52 Time-Span / E4 Period) via has_first_epoch / has_last_epoch
_todo_structural_axes.quota_abs / quota_min_abs / quota_max_ab: GeoPositionNode (crmgeo E94 Space Primitive, P161) — GEOMETRIC, distinct from the identitary LocationNodeGroup
_todo_structural_axes.documentazione / doc_usv / n_catalogo_*: DocumentNode (crmdig) + Extractor chain (crminf) — paradata, P70i is documented in
_todo_structural_axes.rapporti / rapporti2: stratigraphic-relation EDGES (crmarchaeo AP11/AP13 + em: subproperties abuts/cuts/fills/overlies) — handled by the rapporti subsystem, not by this mapping
